title: hieracium pallescens subsp. villosipes
intro: Hieracium pallescens subsp. villosipes is a subspecies of the lesser hawk's-beard plant, a member of the dandelion family with yellow flowers. Traditionally, Hieracium pallescens subsp. villosipes is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Hieracium pallescens subsp. villosipes may include teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
